content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "QAQ". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/894/A
content.inputFormat: The input consists of a single string s of length 1 to 100, containing only the characters 'Q', 'A', and ' '. The string represents a sequence of QAQ operations.
content.outputFormat: Output the number of 'QAQ' sequences found in the input string.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Iterate through the input string to identify 'QAQ' sequences.
